untranslatable_reason: Signal requires time-of-day window filtering (Asian-European overlap 02:00-18:00 CET) and policy event calendar lookhead (48 hours before announcement), which cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. Position sizing multiplier (1.5x) and leverage factor are also external parameters not translatable to indicator-based conditions. The core flow detection is approximated with vol_ratio_20 and hvol_20, but the temporal and event-driven context is lost.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture elevated volume/volatility detection using vol_ratio_20 > 1.1 (equivalent to 110% of 20-day average) and hvol_20 > 0.2 (1.2x baseline volatility approximation). Exit uses simple reversal logic. The strategic alpha of this signal depends critically on time-aware execution and calendar-driven policy windows that are not available in the indicator set. Recommend implementing as a separate module with datetime filtering and external event data.
